summary_facts.current_role: Associate Software Engineer (Data Analyst track) at Accenture
summary_facts.current_client: Google — Google Play Partnerships, Play Policy team
summary_facts.background: Computer Engineering (Thapar Institute), prior full-stack development experience

verified_bullets.core_action: Designed and maintained Power BI dashboards tracking operational KPIs for Google's Play Policy team
Engineered SQL queries to analyse issue trends and support reporting needs, enabling operations teams to make data-driven decisions
Implemented automation scripts and collaborated with cross-functional stakeholders to translate requirements into analytical outputs
Engineered an e-commerce platform with optimised backend workflows
Implemented Stripe payment gateway with real-time validation, error handling, and audit logging
Optimised frontend components using lazy loading and component-level performance enhancements
Designed a Power BI dashboard tracking sales revenue and product KPIs across multiple regions
Investigated sales trends using SQL and identified a noticeable revenue drop in the Electronics category, summarised in Excel reports
Examined 1,470 employee records to identify attrition patterns across departments, tenure, and salary bands
Designed a Power BI dashboard highlighting high-attrition segments; finding: employees with under 2 years tenure had noticeably higher attrition
Queried a Netflix user dataset using SQL to compare churn rates across subscription plans
Identified higher churn among Basic plan users; created a Tableau dashboard and proposed targeted improvements to reduce churn

education.institute: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology
